description_long: This motorcycle features a minimalist, retro-inspired design with a matte gray fuel tank accented by a red diagonal stripe. The seat is a deep maroon color, streamlined and slightly raised at the rear, giving it a classic café racer silhouette. The frame and wheels are predominantly black, with thick tires and a visible rear suspension system. The handlebars are straight and wide, equipped with standard grips and mirrors, while the headlight is round and mounted centrally. The engine and exhaust system are exposed, with metallic finishes and simple, functional lines. Overall, the motorcycle exudes a rugged yet stylish urban character, suitable for city commuting or casual rides.
description: A retro-styled motorcycle with a matte gray tank, maroon seat, and black frame, featuring a minimalist café racer design and exposed engine components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the maroon seat, gray tank with red stripe, black wheels, and exposed engine details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the round headlight, wide handlebars, and the narrow profile of the front tire.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same maroon seat, gray tank, and engine, with a clear look at the exhaust system.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the maroon seat, rear wheel, and the alignment of the tank and handlebars.
